Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (golfing expenÂ­ses)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (golfing expenses)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends subparagraph 18(1)(l)(i) of the Income Tax Act to permit the deduction of an expense incurred by a taxpayer for the use of a golf course or facility.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Subparagraph 18(1)(l)(i) of the Income Tax Act is replaced by the following:

Subparagraph.Label: (i)
Subparagraph.Text: for the use or maintenance of property that is a yacht, a camp or a lodge, unless the taxpayer made or incurred the outlay or expense in the ordinary course of the taxpayerâs business of providing the property for hire or reward, or
